title: lastrea himalayensis
intro: Lastrea himalayensis, also known as Himalayan Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayan region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is believed to have various health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Lastrea himalayensis is also used to treat digestive problems, skin conditions, and other health issues.
